pageContext.name: Dragonzord (Clear)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Super 7 are excited to bring you the Dragonzord (Clear) Action Figure!  Whether combining with other Dinozords or just fighting on its own, the Dragonzord might be the most versatile tool the Mighty Morphin Power Rangers have to fight Rita Repulsa, Lord Zedd, and the rest of the villains who threaten Angel Grove!  Standing 11 tall with seven points of articulation, the clear variant of the Super Cyborg Dragonzord figure features a removable chest plate that reveals its inner workings- including Mighty Morphin Green Ranger at its command! Adding this Mighty Morphin Power Rangers Super Cyborg Dragonzord figure to your collection is the clear choice!  Power up and add Dragonzord to your collection today!
